sections.paragraph:
with suff. אָכְלֹו n. act.-

(1) an eating, a devouring, i.q. to eat. Exo 12:4, אִישׁ לִפִי אָכְלֹו “every one according to his eating;” 16:16 , 18 Exo 16:18, 21 Exo 16:21 Job 20:21.

(2) food, especially-(a) corn, grain, meal, provision, Gen 14:11 41:35 , seq.; 42:7 , seq.; 43:2 , seq.; 44:1 (b) prey, Job 9:26 39:29 .
